description_long: This is a structured baseball cap featuring a solid black crown and a flat, camouflage-patterned brim. The front panel displays a white embroidered chevron logo, adding a distinct urban flair. The brim is wide and flat, with a sticker label visible on the top, indicating a likely brand or size detail. The crown is rounded and structured, with visible panel seams and a fabric-covered button at the top. The back of the cap is plain black, with no visible adjustment mechanism, suggesting a fitted style. The materials appear to be a combination of cotton or polyester fabric for the crown and brim, with a possible plastic or cardboard insert inside the brim for structure.
description: A black baseball cap with a flat camouflage brim and a white chevron logo on the front. The cap has a structured, rounded crown and a wide, flat brim.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black crown, white chevron logo, and the camouflage-patterned flat brim with a sticker.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid black crown and the camouflage brim extending outward, with the sticker visible on the brim.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain black back of the cap, with no visible adjustment strap or opening.
description_view_3: Angled side view emphasizing the smooth, rounded crown and the flat, camo-patterned brim.
